caption: A man wearing a towering, grey, spiked wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a brown bowtie and beige suspenders. He is positioned behind a black microphone on a boom arm. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items on racks. To the left of the man, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and to the right, text reads "BOSS TALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, shifting his gaze slightly downward and adjusting his facial expression while speaking or listening. His posture remains relatively still as he interacts with the unseen participants of the podcast, with only subtle movements in his head and mouth visible across the duration of the clip.
